title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Bangalore - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIM Bangalore - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
